name: 16 Oz. Ziti Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare ziti according to package instructions.
2. Brown the beef in a pan over medium heat until fully cooked through.
3. Remove the beef from the pan and stir in the ricotta cheese, egg, salt, pepper, and Parmesan cheese.
4. Add 1/2 of the spaghetti sauce and mix well with the ingredients.
5. Add the ziti to the mixture and toss gently to ensure even coverage.
6. Transfer the contents to a 9 x 13 inch baking dish, spreading any remaining spaghetti sauce over the top.
7. Sprinkle shredded mozzarella cheese evenly over the surface.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 20 minutes or until heated through and bubbly.
